"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-212", "name": "Improper Removal of Sensitive Information Before Storage or Transfer"}], "description": "### Summary
Weblate leaks the IP address of the project member inviting the user to the project in the audit log.

### Details
The audit log included IP addresses from admin-triggered actions, and those could be viewed by invited users.

### Impact

The inviting user's (admin's) IP address could be leaked to invited users.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00181, "percentile": 0.07873}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gr35-vpx2-qxhc", "github_reviewed_at": "2025-11-05T18:45:59Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gr35-vpx2-qxhc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gr35-vpx2-qxhc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-64326"}], "nvd_published_at": "2025-11-06T21:15:43Z", "published_at": "2025-11-05T18:45:59Z", "references": ["https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/security/advisories/GHSA-gr35-vpx2-qxhc", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/pull/16781", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/commit/b847e9756a0a6f7659ef20fa9f34846ca862c574", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-64326", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/weblate/PYSEC-2025-230.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gr35-vpx2-qxhc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/WeblateOrg/weblate/security-advisories/GHSA-gr35-vpx2-qxhc", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate", "summary": "Weblate leaks the IP of project member inviting user to be reviewer in Audit log", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-06T00:35:25Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gr35-vpx2-qxhc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.14.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "weblate"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 5.14.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
